message:
refactor: add Ord derives and RemoteTaskId::from_raw for distributed modules

Prerequisite trait derives needed by the new distributed tracing and
harness modules which store IDs in BTreeMaps:

- src/remote.rs: Add PartialOrd + Ord to NodeId and RemoteTaskId.
  Add RemoteTaskId::from_raw(u64) constructor for test harness use.

- src/types/id.rs: Add PartialOrd + Ord to ObligationId for use
  in the obligation lattice BTreeMap.

- src/util/arena.rs: Add PartialOrd + Ord to ArenaIndex (underlying
  type for ObligationId, TaskId, RegionId).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
